description:
Convert visible?/2 pattern match clause to single-line do: syntax

Current (line 92-94):
```elixir
def visible?(%__MODULE__{vesting_time: vt, lease_id: nil}, now) do
  now >= vt
end
```

Target:
```elixir
def visible?(%__MODULE__{vesting_time: vt, lease_id: nil}, now), do: now >= vt
```

File: apps/bedrock_job_queue/lib/bedrock/job_queue/item.ex
title: Convert item.ex to do: syntax
